/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/CH2:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 120D/CTS:1/SWAPD:04-16-18/X:THECOURT INDICATES SENTENCE MAY BE SERVED THROUGH SWAP OR ON HOME DETENTION THROUGH SOLANO COUNTY IF ACCEPTED,/MOP1/IID:2/LVAL/LCHEM/PF525 12/VF2:150//PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/1463ALC/BKFEE/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/CTORD:SCRAM REQUIREMENT IS TERMINATED/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/

/CAL:TRIAL READINESS/X:THE COURT GRANTS THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMENDTHE COMPLAINT TO ADD THE FOLLOWING ALLEGATIONS: PRIOR CONVICTION OF VC 23152(B) MISDEMEANOR ON 08-14-12 IN SOLANO COUNTY; PRIOR CONVICTION OF VC 23152(B) MISDEMEANOR ON 02-05-15 IN SOLANO COUNTY,/FAWC/IRRC/  /X:DEFENDANT ADMITS THE ALLEGATIONS OF PRIOR VC 23152(B) MISDEMEANOR CONVICTIONS AS TRUE,//TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DISM3/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DAWT/STW:04-23-18/CONTD:READINESS IN DEPARTMENT13/X:THE DEFENDANT IS ON A 2 HR STANDBY FOR READINESS/CONTD:TRIAL IN DEPARTMENT 17/DOPC/

/CAL:TRIAL/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:THE CASE RESOLVED IN D13 ON 04-13-18/
